android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAG.description: Allows an application to write to external storage.

certificate_findings: Application is signed with a code signing certificate

Application is signed with v1 signature scheme, making it vulnerable to Janus vulnerability on Android 5.0-8.0, if signed only with v1 signature scheme. Applications running on Android 5.0-7.0 signed with v1, and v2/v3 scheme is also vulnerable.
Application is signed with SHA1withRSA. SHA1 hash algorithm is known to have collision issues. The manifest file indicates SHA256withRSA is in use.
Certificate algorithm might be vulnerable to hash collision

manifest_findings.title: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 4.4-4.4.4, [minSdk=19]
manifest_findings.description: This application can be installed on an older version of android that has multiple unfixed vulnerabilities. These devices won't receive reasonable security updates from Google. Support an Android version => 10, API 29 to receive reasonable security updates.
manifest_findings.name: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 4.4-4.4.4, [minSdk=19]

manifest_findings.title: Clear text traffic is Enabled For App[android:usesCleartextTraffic=true]
manifest_findings.description: The app intends to use cleartext network traffic, such as cleartext HTTP, FTP stacks, DownloadManager, and MediaPlayer. The default value for apps that target API level 27 or lower is "true". Apps that target API level 28 or higher default to "false". The key reason for avoiding cleartext traffic is the lack of confidentiality, authenticity, and protections against tampering; a network attacker can eavesdrop on transmitted data and also modify it without being detected.
manifest_findings.name: Clear text traffic is Enabled For App [android:usesCleartextTraffic=true]

manifest_findings.title: Broadcast Receiver (com.learnium.RNDeviceInfo.RNDeviceReceiver) is not Protected. [android:exported=true]
manifest_findings.description: A Broadcast Receiver is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device.
manifest_findings.name: Broadcast Receiver com.learnium.RNDeviceInfo.RNDeviceReceiver is not Protected. [android:exported=true]

manifest_findings.title: Broadcast Receiver (com.pushwoosh.PushAmazonReceiver) is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. Permission: com.amazon.device.messaging.permission.SEND [android:exported=true]
manifest_findings.description: A Broadcast Receiver is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device. It is protected by a permission which is not defined in the analysed application. As a result, the protection level of the permission should be checked where it is defined. If it is set to normal or dangerous, a malicious application can request and obtain the permission and interact with the component. If it is set to signature, only applications signed with the same certificate can obtain the permission.
manifest_findings.name: Broadcast Receiver com.pushwoosh.PushAmazonReceiver is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. [Permission: com.amazon.device.messaging.permission.SEND] [android:exported=true]

nx.description: The binary has NX bit set. This marks a memory page non-executable making attacker injected shellcode non-executable.

pie.description: The shared object is build with -fPIC flag which enables Position independent code. This makes Return Oriented Programming (ROP) attacks much more difficult to execute reliably.

stack_canary.description: This binary has a stack canary value added to the stack so that it will be overwritten by a stack buffer that overflows the return address. This allows detection of overflows by verifying the integrity of the canary before function return.

relocation_readonly.description: This shared object has full RELRO enabled. RELRO ensures that the GOT cannot be overwritten in vulnerable ELF binaries. In Full RELRO, the entire GOT (.got and .got.plt both) is marked as read-only.

rpath.description: The binary does not have run-time search path or RPATH set.

runpath.description: The binary does not have RUNPATH set.

fortify.description: The binary does not have any fortified functions. Fortified functions provides buffer overflow checks against glibc's commons insecure functions like strcpy, gets etc. Use the compiler option -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 to fortify functions. This check is not applicable for Dart/Flutter libraries.

nx.description: The binary has NX bit set. This marks a memory page non-executable making attacker injected shellcode non-executable.

pie.description: The shared object is build with -fPIC flag which enables Position independent code. This makes Return Oriented Programming (ROP) attacks much more difficult to execute reliably.

stack_canary.description: This binary has a stack canary value added to the stack so that it will be overwritten by a stack buffer that overflows the return address. This allows detection of overflows by verifying the integrity of the canary before function return.

relocation_readonly.description: This shared object has full RELRO enabled. RELRO ensures that the GOT cannot be overwritten in vulnerable ELF binaries. In Full RELRO, the entire GOT (.got and .got.plt both) is marked as read-only.

runpath.description: The binary does not have RUNPATH set.

metadata.cwe: CWE-532: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
metadata.description: The App logs information. Sensitive information should never be logged.

metadata.cwe: CWE-327: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
metadata.description: MD5 is a weak hash known to have hash collisions.
App can read/write to External Storage. Any App can read data written to External Storage.

metadata.cwe: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
metadata.description: App uses SQLite Database and execute raw SQL query. Untrusted user input in raw SQL queries can cause SQL Injection. Also sensitive information should be encrypted and written to the database.

metadata.cwe: CWE-312: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
metadata.description: Files may contain hardcoded sensitive information like usernames, passwords, keys etc.

metadata.cwe: CWE-649: Reliance on Obfuscation or Encryption of Security-Relevant Inputs without Integrity Checking
metadata.description: The App uses the encryption mode CBC with PKCS5/PKCS7 padding. This configuration is vulnerable to padding oracle attacks.
This App may have root detection capabilities.

metadata.cwe: CWE-330: Use of Insufficiently Random Values
metadata.description: The App uses an insecure Random Number Generator.
App creates temp file. Sensitive information should never be written into a temp file.
This App uses SSL certificate pinning to detect or  prevent MITM attacks in secure communication channel.

"common_google_play_services_unsupported_text" : "ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸಾಧನದ ಮೂಲಕ ಬೆಂಬಲಿಸದಿರುವ Google Play ಸೇವೆಗಳಿಲ್ಲದೆ %1$s ರನ್‌ ಆಗುವುದಿಲ್ಲ."
"common_google_play_services_enable_text" : "ଆପଣ Google Play ସେବା ସକ୍ଷମ ନ କରିବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ %1$s କାମ କରିବ ନାହିଁ।"
"common_google_play_services_unsupported_text" : "%1$s ଏହି Google Play ସେବାଗୁଡ଼ିକ ବିନା ଚାଲେ ନାହିଁ, ଏବଂ ସେଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଡିଭାଇସ୍‌ରେ କାମ କରେ ନାହିଁ।"
"common_google_play_services_unknown_issue" : "%1$s har problemer med Google Play-tjenester. Prøv på nytt."
"abc_searchview_description_voice" : "ຊອກຫາດ້ວຍສຽງ"
"common_google_play_services_unsupported_text" : "Google Play ဝန်ဆောင်မှုများကို သင့်စက်ပစ္စည်းတွင် ပံ့ပိုးမထားသည့်အတွက် ၎င်းမရှိဘဲ %1$s ကို ဖွင့်၍မရပါ။"
"common_google_play_services_install_text" : "Rakendus %1$s töötab ainult koos Google Play teenustega, mida teie seadmes pole."
"common_google_play_services_updating_text" : "%1$s, Google Play સેવાઓ વગર શરૂ થશે નહીં, જે વર્તમાનમાં અપડેટ થઈ રહી છે."
"common_google_play_services_update_text" : "I-%1$s ngeke ize iqalise ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyekeze i-Google Play."
"common_google_play_services_updating_text" : "Қазіргі уақытта жаңартылып жатқан Google Play қызметтерінсіз %1$s іске қосылмайды."
"common_google_play_services_wear_update_text" : "Toleo jipya la huduma za Google Play linahitajika. Litajisasisha baada ya muda mfupi."
"common_google_play_services_enable_text" : "Aplikácia %1$s bude fungovať až po povolení služieb Google Play."
"common_google_play_services_unknown_issue" : "Aplikacija %1$s ima problema s Google Play uslugama. Pokušajte ponovo."
"common_google_play_services_wear_update_text" : "Google Play सेवाओं के नए वर्शन की ज़रूरत है. यह जल्द ही अपने आप अपडेट हो जाएगा."
"common_google_play_services_update_text" : "%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"common_google_play_services_install_text" : "Таны төхөөрөмжид Google Play үйлчилгээ байхгүй тул %1$s ажиллахгүй."
"common_google_play_services_updating_text" : "Lai lietotne %1$s darbotos, ir jāinstalē Google Play pakalpojumi. Pašlaik notiek to atjaunināšana."
"common_google_play_services_enable_text" : "Google Play ဝန်ဆောင်မှုများကို မဖွင့်သ၍ %1$s သည်အလုပ်လုပ်မည်မဟုတ်ပါ။"
"common_google_play_services_update_text" : "%1$s kjører ikke med mindre du oppdaterer Google Play Tjenester."
"common_google_play_services_wear_update_text" : "Se necesita una nueva versión de Servicios de Google Play. Se actualizará en breve."
"common_google_play_services_update_text" : "%1$s ei toimi, ellet päivitä Google Play Palveluita."
"abc_searchview_description_query" : "ရှာဖွေရန် မေးခွန်း"
"common_google_play_services_unknown_issue" : "%1$s има проблеми со услугите на Google Play. Обидете се повторно."
"common_google_play_services_enable_text" : "%1$s sẽ không hoạt động nếu bạn không bật dịch vụ của Google Play."
"common_google_play_services_updating_text" : "%1$s hal-hazırda güncəllənən Google Play xidmətləri olmadan çalışmayacaq."
"common_google_play_services_install_text" : "%1$s no s'executarà si Serveis de Google Play no està instal·lat al dispositiu."
"common_google_play_services_updating_text" : "Google Play ସେବାଗୁଡ଼ିକ ବିନା %1$s ଚାଲିବ ନାହିଁ, ଯେଉଁଗୁଡ଼ିକ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଅପଡେଟ୍‌ ହେଉଛି।"
"common_google_play_services_unsupported_text" : "Google Play சேவைகள் இருந்தால் மட்டுமே %1$s பயன்பாடு இயங்கும். ஆனால், உங்கள் சாதனத்தில் அவை ஆதரிக்கப்படவில்லை."
"common_google_play_services_install_text" : "%1$s Google Play services बिना सञ्चालन हुने छैन र तपाईँको यन्त्रमा Google Play services उपलब्ध छैनन्।"
"common_google_play_services_unknown_issue" : "%1$s aplikazioak arazoak ditu Google Play zerbitzuekin. Saiatu berriro."

playstore_details.title: Nickel - An account for all
playstore_details.description:
Join the 4 million customers who have already opened a Nickel account!

With Nickel, open an account, get an international Mastercard, and a local IBAN in just 5 minutes!
             
It's simple, fast, and open to everyone, with no conditions. All you need is a valid ID (190 passports accepted) and €25 to open your account.
  
Register online in minutes at https://nickel.eu/ and pick up your card immediately at one of our Nickel points of sale.                      

Once your account is open, you can rely on our mobile app to simplify your daily life!
            
With the Nickel app, you can:

Manage your account daily:
- Check your balance in real time
- Increase or decrease your payment and withdrawal limits
- View your card's PIN code
- Update your personal information     
                
Pay and get paid:
- Make standard and instant transfers 100% free
- Schedule recurring transferts to make your life easier
- View and share your IBAN         

Security:
- Instantly block and unblock your card if you lose it
- Block and unblock online and/or contactless payments.
- Set up personalized alerts to notify you if a transaction exceeds a certain amount or if a payment is made abroad
                
Additional service:
- Access the international money transfer service with Ria
                
Nickel points of sale and customer service:
- Find the nearest Nickel point of sale 
- Check our online FAQs 
- Find out how to contact our customer service

high.title: App can be installed on a vulnerable unpatched Android version 4.4-4.4.4, [minSdk=19]
high.description: This application can be installed on an older version of android that has multiple unfixed vulnerabilities. These devices won't receive reasonable security updates from Google. Support an Android version => 10, API 29 to receive reasonable security updates.

high.title: Clear text traffic is Enabled For App[android:usesCleartextTraffic=true]
high.description: The app intends to use cleartext network traffic, such as cleartext HTTP, FTP stacks, DownloadManager, and MediaPlayer. The default value for apps that target API level 27 or lower is "true". Apps that target API level 28 or higher default to "false". The key reason for avoiding cleartext traffic is the lack of confidentiality, authenticity, and protections against tampering; a network attacker can eavesdrop on transmitted data and also modify it without being detected.

high.title: The App uses the encryption mode CBC with PKCS5/PKCS7 padding. This configuration is vulnerable to padding oracle attacks.
high.description:
The App uses the encryption mode CBC with PKCS5/PKCS7 padding. This configuration is vulnerable to padding oracle attacks.
https://github.com/MobSF/owasp-mstg/blob/master/Document/0x04g-Testing-Cryptography.md#identifying-insecure-andor-deprecated-cryptographic-algorithms-mstg-crypto-4

Files:
com/oblador/keychain/cipherStorage/CipherStorageKeystoreAESCBC.java, line(s) 113,129
com/pushwoosh/internal/a/a.java, line(s) 14

warning.title: Application vulnerable to Janus Vulnerability
warning.description: Application is signed with v1 signature scheme, making it vulnerable to Janus vulnerability on Android 5.0-8.0, if signed only with v1 signature scheme. Applications running on Android 5.0-7.0 signed with v1, and v2/v3 scheme is also vulnerable.

warning.title: Certificate algorithm might be vulnerable to hash collision
warning.description: Application is signed with SHA1withRSA. SHA1 hash algorithm is known to have collision issues. The manifest file indicates SHA256withRSA is in use.

warning.title: Broadcast Receiver (com.learnium.RNDeviceInfo.RNDeviceReceiver) is not Protected. [android:exported=true]
warning.description: A Broadcast Receiver is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device.

warning.title: Broadcast Receiver (com.pushwoosh.PushAmazonReceiver) is Protected by a permission, but the protection level of the permission should be checked. Permission: com.amazon.device.messaging.permission.SEND [android:exported=true]
warning.description: A Broadcast Receiver is found to be shared with other apps on the device therefore leaving it accessible to any other application on the device. It is protected by a permission which is not defined in the analysed application. As a result, the protection level of the permission should be checked where it is defined. If it is set to normal or dangerous, a malicious application can request and obtain the permission and interact with the component. If it is set to signature, only applications signed with the same certificate can obtain the permission.

Ensure that these permissions are required by the application.

android.permission.READ_CONTACTS (dangerous): read contact data - Allows an application to read all of the contact (address) data stored on your phone. Malicious applications can use this to send your data to other people.
